Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-24 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
Today's data reveals an extraordinary outlier in TNGX, which ranks #1 with a composite score of 96.1 and demonstrates extreme momentum across nearly all timeframes—most notably a 1,000% one-year return that dwarfs its SPY outperformance of 984% and QQQ outperformance of 978%. However, this exceptional performance masks a critical vulnerability: TNGX's ratio consistency shows a massive 14.31x jump from 1-week to 1-month returns, followed by a 7.86x spike from 3-month to 1-year, suggesting the gains were concentrated in discrete rallies rather than steady momentum. In stark contrast, PRE (#2, score 89.6) shows more measured but concerning patterns—its 3-month return of 23.26% actually declined relative to its 1-month return of 38.02% (a 0.61 ratio), and it carries a notably higher bad_spy_score of 1.44 versus TNGX's 0.38, indicating PRE tends to underperform when SPY has negative days. Both tickers pass all SMA gates and outpace major indices meaningfully, but TNGX's extreme volatility in ratio expansion and PRE's deteriorating momentum structure from intermediate to longer timeframes suggest very different risk profiles
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
